purpose: Collection of products from same line presented in narrative flat lay. Story-driven layout.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial collection story flat lay showing {collection_descriptor} with multiple coordinated pieces in narrative layout suggesting collection theme, complementary props supporting brand story, soft directional natural light, hyper-realistic detail, shot from directly overhead at 35mm at f/5.6, premium fashion editorial aesthetic, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: launch. Source code in research corpus: R04. Saudi adaptation guidance: For Saudi fashion brand collection launches. Story reflects Saudi brand narrative through prop selection. Reference image: Required. Recommended frequency: 1 per collection launch.
